headline: A good human being building durable software
summary: Experienced software engineer with a broad product and platform background spanning Java, TypeScript, React, Node.js, Spring Boot, AWS, and distributed systems. I care about building software that scales in both architecture and clarity.
body: My recent work has focused on cloud systems, platform thinking, and delivery in fast-moving environments where architecture and execution both matter. I enjoy creating systems that can evolve over time rather than collapsing under their own complexity.

Beyond implementation, I invest in writing, technical storytelling, and explaining difficult ideas well. That mix is especially valuable for portfolio content, case studies, and proposed endeavor narratives where substance and communication need to reinforce each other.
